text: The presiding officer shall call at least one meeting of the board each year and may hold other meetings as the presiding officer determines are appropriate.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.105 — Meetings

The presiding officer shall call at least one meeting of the board each year and may hold other meetings as the presiding officer determines are appropriate.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*
